April 4,2007
Scott H. Howard, City Attorney
City of Glendale
613 East Broadway, Room 220
Glendale, Califomia 9 1206-4394
RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-226
Dear Mr. Howard:
This letter is to inform you that, at your request, the Fair Political practices
Commission ("Commission") has withdrawn your request for advice regarding the
9:h::.1?d.pa413nt (or cosponsored event) provisions of tf," Political Reform,t"t 1tt "
"Act")' dated November 21,2006.
In a March 7,2007 telephone conversation, I informed you that the Commission
was considering amending or adding regulations that would -ut".iully affect the area of
the Act about which you were requesting advice. You stated that the matter was not
pressing. You also stated that if you did not receive a request from the people you
represent to obtain advice regarding the application of current law within the next week,
you would withdraw your request and resubmit it later. Because I have not received any
return calls from you since our last conversation, your request is deemed withdrawn.
Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the
Commission at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
C
ACRjgl
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding the fundraised event (or cosponsored event) provisions of the Political Reform Act, though specific details of the question are not provided in this withdrawal letter.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC withdrew the requestor's advice request at their request, as the matter was not pressing and the requestor indicated they would resubmit later if needed, particularly in light of potential regulatory amendments affecting the relevant area of law.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no formal question or conclusion sections. The document indicates potential regulatory amendments were being considered that would affect the area of law in question. Date discrepancy noted: document dated April 4, 2007 but references November 21, 2006 request date and March 7, 2007 conversation.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding the fundraised event (or cosponsored event) provisions of the Political Reform Act, though specific details of the question are not provided in this withdrawal letter.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC withdrew the requestor's advice request at their request, as the matter was not pressing and the requestor indicated they would resubmit later if needed, particularly in light of potential regulatory amendments affecting the relevant area of law.

embedding.summary: The FPPC withdrew Scott H. Howard's advice request (File No. W-06-226) regarding fundraised/cosponsored event provisions of the Political Reform Act, as requested by the City of Glendale's City Attorney during a March 7, 2007 telephone conversation.
